channel.title: Tmux on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Tmux on Judy AI Lab

item.title: AI Night Shift Setup Guide: The Complete tmux + cron + Claude Code Architecture
item.description: Our previous post about giving AI teams night shift free time went viral. Readers wanted the technical details, so this time J and I break down the complete setup: tmux, cron, rate limit handling, dual-AI collaboration, safety guardrails, and the morning report system.
